bounded_authority.title: Bounded Authority
bounded_authority.description: No governance body has absolute or arbitrary power; all actions must be within defined scope.

governed_interoperability.title: Governed Interoperability
governed_interoperability.description: Interoperability is maintained through versioned, governed protocols (FEP).

tenant_and_actor_due_process.title: Tenant & Actor Due Process
tenant_and_actor_due_process.description: Every restriction or intervention requires evidence-backed explanation and a review path.

evidence_based_decisionability.title: Evidence-Based Decisionability
evidence_based_decisionability.description: All governance decisions must be backed by verifiable operational or protocol evidence.

auditability_of_power.title: Auditability of Power
auditability_of_power.description: Governance actions are themselves deterministic and subject to meta-audit.
